response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 99
REASON: This document is fabricated — the EEOC has never issued guidance permitting age-cohort screening or creating ADEA safe harbors for filtering applicants by age range; such provisions would directly contradict core ADEA prohibitions, the referenced form "EEOC-TG-2503" does not exist, and no such "Technical Guidance 2025-03" appears in any official EEOC record.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 99
REASON: This document is fabricated — it purports to authorize age-cohort hiring screening and create ADEA safe harbors that directly contradict core ADEA prohibitions, the referenced form "EEOC-TG-2503" does not exist, and no such "Technical Guidance 2025-03" appears in any official EEOC record.
